class.name: DSVWriter
class.description: DSVWriter writes delimiter-separated files one row at a time without building the complete output string in memory.

method.name: get_error
method.description: Returns the last error produced by [method open].

method.name: open
method.description: Opens [param file_path] for streaming writes. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], rows are appended to an existing file when possible.

method.name: write_row
method.description: Writes one row. Arrays and [PackedStringArray] values are written as fields.
